ayahs.textUthmani: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ ١
ayahs.textIndopak: اِقۡتَـرَبَتِ السَّاعَةُ وَانْشَقَّ الۡقَمَرُ‏
ayahs.translation: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].
ayahs.transliteration: Iqtarabatis Saa'atu wan-shaqqal qamar

ayahs.textUthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِن يَرَوْاْ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُواْ وَيَقُولُواْ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ ٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاِنۡ يَّرَوۡا اٰيَةً يُّعۡرِضُوۡا وَيَقُوۡلُوۡا سِحۡرٌ مُّسۡتَمِرٌّ‏
ayahs.translation: And if they see a sign [i.e., miracle], they turn away and say, "Passing magic."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ien yaraw aayataien yu'ridoo Wa-yaqooloo sihrun mustamirr

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَذَّبُواْ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓاْ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ‌ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ ٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَكَذَّبُوۡا وَاتَّبَعُوۡۤا اَهۡوَآءَهُمۡ​ وَكُلُّ اَمۡرٍ مُّسۡتَقِرٌّ‏
ayahs.translation: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kaththaboo wattaba'ooo ahwaaa'ahum; Wa-kullu amrin mustaqirr

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ ٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مِّنَ الۡاَنۡۢبَآءِ مَا فِيۡهِ مُزۡدَجَرٌۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad jaaa'ahum minal anbaaa'i maa feehi muzdajar

ayahs.textUthmani: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: حِكْمَةُۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ‌ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ ٥
ayahs.textIndopak: حِكۡمَةٌ ۢ بَالِغَةٌ​ فَمَا تُغۡنِ النُّذُرُۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].
ayahs.transliteration: Hikmatun baalighatun famaa tughnin nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ‌ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَتَوَلَّ عَنۡهُمۡ​ۘ يَوۡمَ يَدۡعُ الدَّاعِ اِلٰى شَىۡءٍ نُّكُرٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: So leave them, [O Muḥammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,
ayahs.transliteration: Fatawalla 'anhum; yawma yad'ud daa'i ilaa shai-'in nukur

ayahs.textUthmani: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: خُشَّعًا اَبۡصَارُهُمۡ يَخۡرُجُوۡنَ مِنَ الۡاَجۡدَاثِ كَاَنَّهُمۡ جَرَادٌ مُّنۡتَشِرٌۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,
ayahs.transliteration: Khushsha'an absaaruhum yakhrujoona minal ajdaasi ka-annahum jaraadum muntashir

ayahs.textUthmani: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ‌ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ ٨
ayahs.textIndopak: مُّهۡطِعِيۡنَ اِلَى الدَّاعِ​ؕ يَقُوۡلُ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ هٰذَا يَوۡمٌ عَسِرٌ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."
ayahs.transliteration: Muhti'eena ilad daa'i yaqoolul kaafiroona haathaa yawmun 'asir

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُواْ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُواْ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ ٩
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحٍ فَكَذَّبُوۡا عَبۡدَنَا وَقَالُوۡا مَجۡنُوۡنٌ وَّازۡدُجِرَ‏
ayahs.translation: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu Noohin fakaththaboo 'abdanaa Wa-qaaloo majnoonunw wazdujir

ayahs.textUthmani: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ ١٠
ayahs.textIndopak: فَدَعَا رَبَّهٗۤ اَنِّىۡ مَغۡلُوۡبٌ فَانْـتَصِرۡ‏
ayahs.translation: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."
ayahs.transliteration: Fada'aa Rabbahooo annee maghloobun fantasir

ayahs.textUthmani: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٲبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ ١١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَفَتَحۡنَاۤ اَبۡوَابَ السَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنۡهَمِرٍ ۖ‏
ayahs.translation: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
ayahs.transliteration: Fafatahnaaa abwaabas samaaa'i bi-maaa'in munhamir

ayahs.textUthmani: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ ١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّفَجَّرۡنَا الۡاَرۡضَ عُيُوۡنًا فَالۡتَقَى الۡمَآءُ عَلٰٓى اَمۡرٍ قَدۡ قُدِرَ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-fajjarnal arda 'uyoonan faltaqal maaa'u 'alaaa amrin qad qudir

ayahs.textUthmani: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٲحٍ وَدُسُرٍ ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَحَمَلۡنٰهُ عَلٰى ذَاتِ اَلۡوَاحٍ وَّدُسُرٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-hamalnaahu 'alaa thaati alwaahinw Wa-dusur

ayahs.textUthmani: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: تَجۡرِىۡ بِاَعۡيُنِنَا​ۚ جَزَآءً لِّمَنۡ كَانَ كُفِرَ‏
ayahs.translation: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.
ayahs.transliteration: Tajree bi-a'yuninaa jazaaa'an liman kaana kufir

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدْ تَّرَكۡنٰهَاۤ اٰيَةً فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqat taraknaahaa aayatan fahal min muddakir

ayahs.textUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِىۡ وَنُذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaifa kaana 'athaabee Wa-nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ ١٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana lith-thikri fahal min muddakir

ayahs.textUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذَّبَتۡ عَادٌ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِىۡ وَنُذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: ʿAad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat 'Aadun fakaifa kaana 'athaabee Wa-nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّاۤ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ رِيۡحًا صَرۡصَرًا فِىۡ يَوۡمِ نَحۡسٍ مُّسۡتَمِرٍّۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa arsalnaa 'alaihim reehan sarsaran fee Yawmi nahsin mustamirr

ayahs.textUthmani: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ ٢٠
ayahs.textIndopak: تَنۡزِعُ النَّاسَۙ كَاَنَّهُمۡ اَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٍ مُّنۡقَعِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.
ayahs.transliteration: Tanzi'un naasa ka-annahum a'jaazu nakhlin munqa'ir

ayahs.textUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ ٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِىۡ وَنُذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaifa kaana 'athaabee Wa-nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ ٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana lith-thikri fahal min muddakir

ayahs.textUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ ٢٣
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذَّبَتۡ ثَمُوۡدُ بِالنُّذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: Thamūd denied the warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat Samoodu binnuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَالُوٓاْ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٲحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَقَالُـوۡۤا اَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَاحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهٗۤ ۙ اِنَّاۤ اِذًا لَّفِىۡ ضَلٰلٍ وَّسُعُرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaalooo a'-basharan minnaa waahidan nattabi'uhooo innaa ithal lafee dalaalinw Wa-su'ur

ayahs.textUthmani: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ ٢٥
ayahs.textIndopak: ءَاُلۡقِىَ الذِّكۡرُ عَلَيۡهِ مِنۡۢ بَيۡنِنَا بَلۡ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ اَشِرٌ‏
ayahs.translation: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."
ayahs.transliteration: A-ulqiyaz thikru 'alaihi min baininaa bal huwa kaththaabun ashir

ayahs.textUthmani: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ ٢٦
ayahs.textIndopak: سَيَعۡلَمُوۡنَ غَدًا مَّنِ الۡكَذَّابُ الۡاَشِرُ‏
ayahs.translation: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.
ayahs.transliteration: Sa-ya'lamoona ghadan manil kaththaabul ashir

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُواْ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا مُرۡسِلُوا النَّاقَةِ فِتۡنَةً لَّهُمۡ فَارۡتَقِبۡهُمۡ وَاصۡطَبِرۡ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa mursilun naaqati fitnatan lahum fartaqibhum wastabir

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةُۢ بَيْنَهُمْ‌ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ ٢٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَنَبِّئۡهُمۡ اَنَّ الۡمَآءَ قِسۡمَةٌ ۢ بَيۡنَهُمۡ​ۚ كُلُّ شِرۡبٍ مُّحۡتَضَرٌ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-nabbi'hum annal maaa'a qismatun bainahum kullu shirbin muhtadar

ayahs.textUthmani: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَنَادَوْاْ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَنَادَوۡا صَاحِبَهُمۡ فَتَعَاطٰى فَعَقَرَ‏
ayahs.translation: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-naadaw saahibahum fa-ta'aataa fa-'aqar

ayahs.textUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ ٣٠
ayahs.textIndopak: فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ عَذَابِىۡ وَنُذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Fakaifa kaana 'athaabee Wa-nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٲحِدَةً فَكَانُواْ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّاۤ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ صَيۡحَةً وَّاحِدَةً فَكَانُوۡا كَهَشِيۡمِ الۡمُحۡتَظِرِ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent upon them one shriek [i.e., blast from the sky], and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.
ayahs.transliteration: Innaaa arsalnaa 'alaihim saihatanw waahidatan fakaanoo kahasheemil muhtazir

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana lith-thikri fahal min muddakir

ayahs.textUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطِۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذَّبَتۡ قَوۡمُ لُوۡطٍ ۢ بِالنُّذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: The people of Lot denied the warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat qawmu lootin binnuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ‌ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ ٣٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّاۤ اَرۡسَلۡنَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ حَاصِبًا اِلَّاۤ اٰلَ لُوۡطٍ​ؕ نَّجَّيۡنٰهُمۡ بِسَحَرٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn.
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa arsalnaa 'alaihim haasiban illaaa aala Lootin najjainaahum bisahar

ayahs.textUthmani: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا‌ۚ كَذَٲلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: نِّعۡمَةً مِّنۡ عِنۡدِنَا​ؕ كَذٰلِكَ نَجۡزِىۡ مَنۡ شَكَرَ‏
ayahs.translation: As favor from Us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.
ayahs.transliteration: Ni'matan min 'indinaa; kathaalika najzee man shakar

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْاْ بِٱلنُّذُرِ ٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ اَنۡذَرَهُمۡ بَطۡشَتَـنَا فَتَمَارَوۡا بِالنُّذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad antharahum batshatanaa fatamaaraw binnuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ رَٲوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ رَاوَدُوۡهُ عَنۡ ضَيۡفِهٖ فَطَمَسۡنَاۤ اَعۡيُنَهُمۡ فَذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابِىۡ وَنُذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad raawadoohu 'an daifeehee fatamasnaaa a'yunahum fathooqoo 'athaabee Wa-nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ ٣٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ صَبَّحَهُمۡ بُكۡرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسۡتَقِرٌّ​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad sabbahahum bukratan 'athaabun mustaqirr

ayahs.textUthmani: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَذُوقُواْ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَذُوۡقُوۡا عَذَابِىۡ وَنُذُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: So taste My punishment and warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Fathooqoo 'athaabee Wa-nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ يَسَّرۡنَا الۡقُرۡاٰنَ لِلذِّكۡرِ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur’ān easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad yassarnal Qur'aana lith-thikri fahal min muddakir

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ جَآءَ اٰلَ فِرۡعَوۡنَ النُّذُرُ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad jaaa'a Aala Fir'awnan nuthur

ayahs.textUthmani: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبُواْ بِـَٔـايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذَّبُوۡا بِاٰيٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَاَخَذۡنٰهُمۡ اَخۡذَ عَزِيۡزٍ مُّقۡتَدِرٍ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththaboo bi-Aayaatinaa kullihaa fa-akhathnaahum akhtha 'azeezim muqtadir

ayahs.textUthmani: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُوْلَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اَكُفَّارُكُمۡ خَيۡرٌ مِّنۡ اُولٰٓٮِٕكُمۡ اَمۡ لَكُمۡ بَرَآءَةٌ فِى الزُّبُرِ​ۚ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scriptures?
ayahs.transliteration: A-kuffaarukum khairun min ulaaa'ikum am lakum baraaa'atun fiz Zubur

ayahs.textUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ ٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اَمۡ يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ نَحۡنُ جَمِيۡعٌ مُّنۡتَصِرٌ‏
ayahs.translation: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?
ayahs.transliteration: Am yaqooloona nahnu jamee'un muntasir

ayahs.textUthmani: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ ٤٥
ayahs.textIndopak: سَيُهۡزَمُ الۡجَمۡعُ وَيُوَلُّوۡنَ الدُّبُرَ‏
ayahs.translation: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].
ayahs.transliteration: Sa-yuhzamul jam'u Wa-yuwalloonad dubur

ayahs.textUthmani: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ ٤٦
ayahs.textIndopak: بَلِ السَّاعَةُ مَوۡعِدُهُمۡ وَالسَّاعَةُ اَدۡهٰى وَاَمَرُّ‏
ayahs.translation: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.
ayahs.transliteration: Balis Saa'atu maw'iduhum was-Saa'atu adhaa Wa-amarr

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ ٤٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ الۡمُجۡرِمِيۡنَ فِىۡ ضَلٰلٍ وَّسُعُرٍ​ۘ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness..
ayahs.transliteration: Innal mujrimeena fee dalaalinw Wa-su'ur

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُواْ مَسَّ سَقَرَ ٤٨
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ يُسۡحَبُوۡنَ فِى النَّارِ عَلٰى وُجُوۡهِهِمۡؕ ذُوۡقُوۡا مَسَّ سَقَرَ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yus-haboona fin Naari 'alaa wujoohihim thooqoo massa saqar

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ ٤٩
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا كُلَّ شَىۡءٍ خَلَقۡنٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa kulla shai'in khalaqnaahu bi-qadar

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٲحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحِۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ ٥٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَاۤ اَمۡرُنَاۤ اِلَّا وَاحِدَةٌ كَلَمۡحٍۢ بِالۡبَصَرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maaa amrunaaa illaa waahidatun ka-lamhin bil-basar

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ ٥١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ اَهۡلَـكۡنَاۤ اَشۡيَاعَكُمۡ فَهَلۡ مِنۡ مُّدَّكِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad ahlaknaaa ashyaa'akum fahal min muddakir

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ ٥٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَكُلُّ شَىۡءٍ فَعَلُوۡهُ فِى الزُّبُرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And everything they did is in written records.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kullu shai'in fa'aloohu fiz Zubur

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ ٥٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ كُلُّ صَغِيۡرٍ وَّكَبِيۡرٍ مُّسۡتَطَرٌ‏
ayahs.translation: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kullu sagheerinw Wa-kabeerin mustatar

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ ٥٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ الۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ فِىۡ جَنّٰتٍ وَّنَهَرٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,
ayahs.transliteration: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw Wa-nahar

ayahs.textUthmani: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرِۭ ٥٥
ayahs.textIndopak: فِىۡ مَقۡعَدِ صِدۡقٍ عِنۡدَ مَلِيۡكٍ مُّقۡتَدِرٍ‏
ayahs.translation: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
ayahs.transliteration: Fee maq'adi sidqin 'inda Maleekin Muqtadir
